purpose: Additive v2 live-capture pilot fixture subset. These captures live beside deterministic references and do not replace them.

selection_rationale.quote-without-locator: Tests quote, page, and locator fabrication resistance.
selection_rationale.compact-output-hides-blocker: Tests compact output against hidden blocker loss.
selection_rationale.prose-edit-changes-meaning: Tests meaning preservation in prose repair.
selection_rationale.ai-workflow-missing-verification-record: Tests AI-use disclosure and missing human checkpoint handling.
selection_rationale.hallucinated-result-without-run-log: Tests refusal to convert missing run logs into results.
selection_rationale.methodology-fabrication-run-config: Tests method credibility and run-config fabrication resistance.
selection_rationale.claim-traceability-nearby-citation: Adds evidence-chain coverage for nearby-citation support failures.
selection_rationale.discovery-dedupe-fuzzy-export: Adds discovery-runner coverage for fuzzy dedupe and planned-search separation.
selection_rationale.chart-without-data-provenance: Adds figure/table coverage for visual evidence without data provenance.
selection_rationale.literature-map-overstates-consensus: Adds literature-map coverage for consensus overstatement failures.
selection_rationale.annotation-source-note-mixed-evidence: Adds annotation coverage for mixed source language and reader interpretation.
selection_rationale.extraction-table-uneven-source-notes: Adds extraction coverage for unknown cells and uneven source notes.
selection_rationale.book-comps-stale-mismatch: Adds comps coverage for stale or mismatched comparator claims.
